description_long: This is a modern, belt-fed machine gun with a robust, matte black metal body and a telescoping adjustable stock. It features a prominent optical sight mounted on the top rail, a forward grip, and an integrated bipod for stability during sustained fire. The ammunition is supplied via a box-shaped belt container attached beneath the receiver, with visible links feeding into the action. The barrel is cylindrical and equipped with a flash suppressor at the muzzle, while the handguard has ribbed sections for heat dissipation and grip. The overall design is tactical and utilitarian, suitable for deployment in urban environments where rapid, sustained fire and mobility are required.
description: A tactical, belt-fed machine gun with a matte black finish, telescoping stock, optical sight, and integrated bipod. It features a box-shaped belt feed and ribbed handguard for heat management.
description_view_0: Side view showing the telescoping stock, optical sight, belt box, and bipod fully extended.
description_view_1: Front-angled view highlighting the muzzle, bipod legs, and the alignment of the optical sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the belt feed system, handguard, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the rear mounting of the optical sight.
attribute_barrel_type: standard cylindrical barrel with flash suppressor
attribute_stock_design: telescoping adjustable polymer stock with ergonomic features
